name: UserActivity
description: UserActivity schema from Palo Alto Networks SaaS Security API

user_id.description: ID of the user who performed the action.

app_id.description: SaaS application where the activity occurred.

action.description: Type of action performed (e.g., file_download, share_external).

asset_id.description: ID of the asset involved in the activity.

ip_address.description: Source IP address of the activity.

risk_level.description: Risk level assigned to this activity.
